title: mutisia lehmannii
intro: Mutisia lehmannii, also known as the Ecuadorian Mutisia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Mutisia lehmannii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
